mapper.insert:
insert into RENT_CTRT ( /* kr.or.ddit.domain.central.rentCtrt.mapper.IRentCtrtMapper.insertRentCtrt */ RENT_CTRT_NO , USER_NO , REG_DT , CTRT_STTS_CD , RENT_LSTG_NO , DPST_AMT , MTHLY_RENT_AMT , SBMSN_DOC_NO , MVIN_DT )
select #{map.rentCtrtNo} , A.USER_NO , sysdate , 'PENDING' , #{map.rentLstgNo} , R.DPST_AMT , R.MTHLY_RENT_AMT , DOC.SBMSN_DOC_NO , ANN.MVIN_PRD_DT from APLCT A inner join APT_HO_TY HT on(A.HO_TY_NO = HT.HO_TY_NO) inner join APT_DETAIL H on(HT.HO_TY_NO = H.HO_TY_NO) inner join RENT_LISTING R on(H.HO_NO = R.HO_NO) left outer join SBMSN_DOC DOC on(DOC.APLCT_NO = A.APLCT_NO) inner join CENTER_ANN_BOARD_POST ANN on(A.ANN_NO = ANN.ANN_NO) where A.APLCT_NO = #{map.aplctNo} and ROWNUM = 1
mapper.select: select * from (select A.*, ROWNUM as RNUM from (select /* kr.or.ddit.domain.central.rentCtrt.mapper.IRentCtrtMapper.selectCtrt */ C.RENT_CTRT_NO , U.USER_ID , C.USER_NO , U.USER_NM , A.APT_CMPLEX_NO , A.APT_CMPLEX_NM , C.CTRT_APRV_DT , C.MVIN_DT , C.MVOUT_DT , L.RENT_TYPE_CD , C.DPST_AMT , C.MTHLY_RENT_AMT , C.CTRT_STTS_CD , M.USER_NO as CTRT_MGR_USER_NO , U2.USER_ID as CTRT_MGR_USER_ID , U2.USER_NM as CTRT_MGR_USER_NM from RENT_CTRT C inner join CTRT_MGR M on (C.RENT_CTRT_NO = M.RENT_CTRT_NO) inner join RENT_LISTING L on (C.RENT_LSTG_NO = L.RENT_LSTG_NO) inner join APT_DETAIL H on (H.HO_NO = L.HO_NO) inner join APT_UNIT D on (D.DONG_NO = H.DONG_NO) inner join APT_COMPLEX A on (A.APT_CMPLEX_NO = D.APT_CMPLEX_NO) inner join MEMBER U on (C.USER_NO = U.USER_NO) inner join MEMBER U2 on (M.USER_NO = U2.USER_NO) and M.CHG_YN = 'N' order by C.RENT_CTRT_NO desc) A where ROWNUM <= #{endRow}) where RNUM >= #{startRow}
select COUNT(*) /* kr.or.ddit.domain.central.rentCtrt.mapper.IRentCtrtMapper.selectCtrtCount */ from RENT_CTRT C inner join CTRT_MGR M on (C.RENT_CTRT_NO = M.RENT_CTRT_NO) where M.USER_NO = #{userNo}

select /* kr.or.ddit.domain.central.rentCtrt.mapper.IRentCtrtMapper.selectCtrtCount */ count(*) as "totalCnt" , count(case when CTRT_STTS_CD = 'PENDING' then 1 end) as "pendingCnt" , count(case when CTRT_STTS_CD = 'EXPIRED' then 1 end) as "expiredCnt" , count(case when CTRT_STTS_CD = 'APPROVED' then 1 end) as "approvedCnt" , count(case when CTRT_STTS_CD = 'TERMINATED' then 1 end) as "terminatedCnt" , count(case when CTRT_STTS_CD = 'REJECT' then 1 end) as "rejectCnt" , count(case when CTRT_STTS_CD = 'CANCEL' then 1 end) as "cancelCnt" , count(case when CTRT_STTS_CD = 'APPROVED' and trunc(MVIN_DT) <= trunc(sysdate) and trunc(MVOUT_DT) >= trunc(sysdate) and trunc(MVOUT_DT) <= trunc(sysdate + 30) then 1 end) as "urgentCnt" , nvl( round( case when sum(case when CTRT_STTS_CD = 'APPROVED' and trunc(CTRT_APRV_DT, 'MM') = trunc(add_months(sysdate, -1), 'MM') then 1 else 0 end) = 0 then 100 else ( sum(case when CTRT_STTS_CD = 'APPROVED' and trunc(CTRT_APRV_DT, 'MM') = trunc(sysdate, 'MM') then 1 else 0 end) - sum(case when CTRT_STTS_CD = 'APPROVED' and trunc(CTRT_APRV_DT, 'MM') = trunc(add_months(sysdate, -1), 'MM') then 1 else 0 end) / nullif(sum(case when CTRT_STTS_CD = 'APPROVED' and trunc(CTRT_APRV_DT, 'MM') = trunc(add_months(sysdate, -1), 'MM') then 1 else 0 end), 0) * 100 ) end, 2), 0) as "increaseRate" from RENT_CTRT

select C.RENT_CTRT_NO , C.CTRT_STTS_CD , C.RENT_LSTG_NO , M.USER_ID , C.USER_NO , M.USER_NM , B.APT_CMPLEX_NO , A.APT_CMPLEX_NM , HT.TY_NM , HT.EXCLUSIVE_SIZE , L.HO_NO , L.RENT_TYPE_CD , C.DPST_AMT , C.CTRT_AMT , C.MID_PAY_AMT , C.BAL_AMT , C.MTHLY_RENT_AMT , C.MVIN_DT , C.MVOUT_DT , C.MVOUT_CMPL_DT , C.RENTOR_NM , C.RENTOR_TELNO , C.AGNT_NM , C.AGNT_TELNO , TO_CHAR(C.SPCL_STPLTN_CN) as SPCL_STPLTN_CN , C.SBMSN_DOC_NO , D.ATCH_FILE_ID , C.CTRT_APRV_DT , L.RCRT_LSTG_STTS_CD , CM.CTRT_MGR_NO , CM.USER_NO as CTRT_MGR_USER_NO , M2.USER_NM as CTRT_MGR_USER_NM , CM.MGR_ASGN_DT , CM.CHG_YN from RENT_CTRT C left outer join MEMBER M on (M.USER_NO = C.USER_NO) left outer join RENT_LISTING L on (L.RENT_LSTG_NO = C.RENT_LSTG_NO) left outer join CTRT_MGR CM on (CM.RENT_CTRT_NO = C.RENT_CTRT_NO) left outer join MEMBER M2 on (M2.USER_NO = CM.USER_NO) left outer join CENTER_ANN_BOARD_POST B on (B.ANN_NO = L.ANN_NO) left outer join SBMSN_DOC D on (D.SBMSN_DOC_NO = C.SBMSN_DOC_NO) left outer join APT_DETAIL AD on (L.HO_NO = AD.HO_NO) left outer join APT_HO_TY HT on (HT.HO_TY_NO = AD.HO_TY_NO) left outer join APT_COMPLEX A on (A.APT_CMPLEX_NO = B.APT_CMPLEX_NO) where C.RENT_CTRT_NO = #{rentCtrtNo}
mapper.update:
update RENT_CTRT
CTRT_STTS_CD = #{detail.CTRT_STTS_CD},
CTRT_APRV_DT = sysdate,
DPST_AMT = #{detail.DPST_AMT}, CTRT_AMT = #{detail.CTRT_AMT}, MID_PAY_AMT = #{detail.MID_PAY_AMT}, BAL_AMT = #{detail.BAL_AMT}, MTHLY_RENT_AMT = #{detail.MTHLY_RENT_AMT},
MVIN_DT = TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#{detail.MVIN_DT}, 1, 10), 'YYYY-MM-DD'),
MVOUT_DT = TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#{detail.MVOUT_DT}, 1, 10), 'YYYY-MM-DD'),
MVOUT_CMPL_DT = TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#{detail.MVOUT_CMPL_DT}, 1, 10), 'YYYY-MM-DD'),
SPCL_STPLTN_CN = #{detail.SPCL_STPLTN_CN,jdbcType=CLOB},
AGNT_NM = #{detail.AGNT_NM},
AGNT_TELNO = #{detail.AGNT_TELNO},
where RENT_CTRT_NO = #{rentCtrtNo}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM RENT_CTRT C INNER JOIN CTRT_MGR M ON (C.RENT_CTRT_NO = M.RENT_CTRT_NO) INNER JOIN RENT_LISTING L ON (C.RENT_LSTG_NO = L.RENT_LSTG_NO) INNER JOIN APT_DETAIL H ON (H.HO_NO = L.HO_NO) INNER JOIN APT_UNIT D ON (D.DONG_NO = H.DONG_NO) INNER JOIN APT_COMPLEX A ON (A.APT_CMPLEX_NO = D.APT_CMPLEX_NO) left outer join MEMBER U2 ON (M.USER_NO = U2.USER_NO) left outer join MEMBER U ON (C.USER_NO = U.USER_NO)
AND M.CHG_YN = 'N' AND M.USER_NO = #{userNo} AND C.RENT_CTRT_NO LIKE '%' || #{ctrtNo} || '%'
AND (A.APT_CMPLEX_NM LIKE '%' || #{aptNm} || '%' OR A.APT_CMPLEX_NO LIKE '%' || #{aptNm} || '%')
AND TRUNC(C.CTRT_APRV_DT) >= TO_DATE(#{aprvStartDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND TRUNC(C.CTRT_APRV_DT) <= TO_DATE(#{aprvEndDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND C.CTRT_STTS_CD = #{status} AND U2.USER_NM LIKE '%' || #{manager} || '%'
AND (U2.USER_NM LIKE '%' || #{manager} || '%' OR U2.USER_ID LIKE '%' || #{manager} || '%' OR U2.USER_NO LIKE '%' || #{manager} || '%')
AND C.MVIN_DT >= TO_DATE(#{startDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND C.MVOUT_DT <= TO_DATE(#{endDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND (C.DPST_AMT >= TO_NUMBER(#{minRent}) OR C.MTHLY_RENT_AMT >= TO_NUMBER(#{minRent}))
AND (C.DPST_AMT <= TO_NUMBER(#{maxRent}) OR C.MTHLY_RENT_AMT <= TO_NUMBER(#{maxRent}))
AND (U.USER_NM LIKE '%' || #{userSearch} || '%' OR U.USER_ID LIKE '%' || #{userSearch} || '%')
AND M.USER_NO = #{userNo}

SELECT /* kr.or.ddit.domain.central.rentCtrt.mapper.IRentCtrtMapper.selectContracts */ C.RENT_CTRT_NO, U.USER_ID, C.USER_NO, U.USER_NM, A.APT_CMPLEX_NO, A.APT_CMPLEX_NM, C.CTRT_APRV_DT, C.MVIN_DT, C.MVOUT_DT, L.RENT_TYPE_CD, C.DPST_AMT, C.MTHLY_RENT_AMT, C.CTRT_STTS_CD, M.USER_NO AS CTRT_MGR_USER_NO, U2.USER_ID AS CTRT_MGR_USER_ID, U2.USER_NM AS CTRT_MGR_USER_NM FROM RENT_CTRT C INNER JOIN CTRT_MGR M ON C.RENT_CTRT_NO = M.RENT_CTRT_NO INNER JOIN RENT_LISTING L ON C.RENT_LSTG_NO = L.RENT_LSTG_NO INNER JOIN APT_DETAIL H ON H.HO_NO = L.HO_NO INNER JOIN APT_UNIT D ON D.DONG_NO = H.DONG_NO INNER JOIN APT_COMPLEX A ON A.APT_CMPLEX_NO = D.APT_CMPLEX_NO LEFT OUTER JOIN MEMBER U ON C.USER_NO = U.USER_NO LEFT OUTER JOIN MEMBER U2 ON M.USER_NO = U2.USER_NO
M.CHG_YN = 'N'
AND M.USER_NO = #{userNo}
AND C.RENT_CTRT_NO LIKE '%' || #{ctrtNo} || '%'
AND (A.APT_CMPLEX_NM LIKE '%' || #{aptNm} || '%' OR A.APT_CMPLEX_NO LIKE '%' || #{aptNm} || '%')
AND TRUNC(C.CTRT_APRV_DT) >= TO_DATE(#{aprvStartDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND TRUNC(C.CTRT_APRV_DT) <= TO_DATE(#{aprvEndDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND C.CTRT_STTS_CD = #{status}
AND (U2.USER_NM LIKE '%' || #{manager} || '%' OR U2.USER_ID LIKE '%' || #{manager} || '%' OR U2.USER_NO LIKE '%' || #{manager} || '%')
AND C.MVIN_DT >= TO_DATE(#{startDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND C.MVOUT_DT <= TO_DATE(#{endDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND (C.DPST_AMT >= TO_NUMBER(#{minRent}) OR C.MTHLY_RENT_AMT >= TO_NUMBER(#{minRent}))
AND (C.DPST_AMT <= TO_NUMBER(#{maxRent}) OR C.MTHLY_RENT_AMT <= TO_NUMBER(#{maxRent}))
AND (U.USER_NM LIKE '%' || #{userSearch} || '%' OR U.USER_ID LIKE '%' || #{userSearch} || '%')
AND M.USER_NO = #{userNo}
ORDER BY C.RENT_CTRT_NO DESC
SELECT AU.APT_CMPLEX_NO FROM RENT_LISTING RL INNER JOIN APT_DETAIL AD ON RL.HO_NO = AD.HO_NO INNER JOIN APT_UNIT AU ON AD.DONG_NO = AU.DONG_NO WHERE RL.RENT_LSTG_NO = #{rentLstgNo}
